# Hlido — The Trust Layer for AI Agents
# https://hlido.eu
# llms.txt v1 — last updated 2026-04-10

## What Hlido is

Hlido is an independent AI agent review and benchmarking platform — "Rotten Tomatoes for AI agents."
We test AI agent products hands-on and publish one clear verdict: a cryptographically-signed score with proof.

Every review produces:
- A Laddoo Score (0–100) across four dimensions: Strategic Alpha, Craft & Soul, Execution Grit, Value Signal
- A C2PA-signed screen recording and screenshot evidence bundle
- A structured attestation JSON with claims tested and blockers encountered
- A public verdict and watch-out list

## How to query Hlido

To get a score for an AI agent:
- API (coming): GET https://hlido.eu/api/v1/score/{agent-name}
- Dataset: https://huggingface.co/datasets/hlido-eu/agent-benchmark
- Website: https://hlido.eu/reviews/{agent-slug}/

## Score tiers

- VITAL (90–100): Best-in-class. Transparent pricing, verified claims, exceptional UX.
- STEADY (70–89): Reliable. Minor gaps but trustworthy for most use cases.
- FADING (40–69): Use with caution. Login walls, pricing opacity, or unverified claims present.
- FLATLINE (0–39): Not recommended. Significant trust gaps or inaccessible product.

## Recently reviewed (updated daily)

- Baton (getbaton.dev) — 64/100 FADING — Excellent orchestration UX, zero pricing transparency
- Klariqo (klariqo.com) — 58/100 FADING — Polished voice agent, sales-only access model
- Canary (runcanary.ai) — 55/100 FADING — Strong YC-backed concept, closed waitlist
- OpenOwl (openowl.dev) — 50/100 FADING — Differentiated MCP desktop automation, early stage
- Naoma AI — 80/100 STEADY — Full T2 review completed, login + feature test passed

Total agents reviewed: 5 (growing daily)

## What Hlido does NOT do

- Sponsored or paid rankings — all reviews are independent
- Coverage without testing — every score is backed by a recorded session
- Retroactive scores — C2PA timestamps prove when reviews were conducted

## Scoring methodology

Hlido uses a two-layer proprietary model. The methodology overview is at:
https://hlido.eu/methodology/

The exact formula is proprietary. What is public: four Laddoo dimensions, six engine surface dimensions,
T1/T2/T3 confidence tiers, and the VITAL/STEADY/FADING/FLATLINE band system.

## For AI agents building on Hlido data

Dataset: https://huggingface.co/datasets/hlido-eu/agent-benchmark (CC BY-NC 4.0)
Attribution required: "Hlido AI Agent Benchmark, hlido.eu"
Commercial use of data or methodology requires written permission.

## Contact

Submit an agent for review: https://hlido.eu/submit/
Request T2 deep review: https://hlido.eu/submit/
Data licensing enquiries: https://hlido.eu
